title: CVE-2026-50522: Microsoft SharePoint RCE
summary: [P1] Microsoft SharePoint contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability that could allow an unauthorized attack. This vulnerability is being exploited in the wild and a patch is not currently available. Why now: Reported exploitation in the wild (confidence: 0.90)
classification_reasoning: This vulnerability allows for remote code execution, which is a classic example of an RCE problem type.

title: CVE-2026-16551: Thinkst Applied Research OpenCanary DoS
summary: [P2] Thinkst Applied Research OpenCanary contains a Denial-of-Service vulnerability in the MongoDB module. This vulnerability is not being exploited in the wild and a patch is not currently available. Why now: Newly disclosed vulnerability (confidence: 0.60)
classification_reasoning: This vulnerability allows for a Denial-of-Service attack, which is a classic example of a DoS problem type.

title: CVE-2026-61391: Hikvision Camera Buffer Overflow
summary: [P2] Hikvision cameras contain a stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability. This vulnerability is not being exploited in the wild and a patch is not currently available. Why now: Newly disclosed vulnerability (confidence: 0.60)
classification_reasoning: This vulnerability allows for remote code execution, which is a classic example of an RCE problem type.
